content.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CALENDAR" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_CALENDAR" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"
        android:maxSdkVersion="28" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"
        android:maxSdkVersion="32" />

    <application
        android:name=".CourtApp"
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:icon="@drawable/launcher_icon"
        android:roundIcon="@drawable/launcher_icon"
        android:label="法院助手"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.CourtAssistant"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="true">

        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:icon="@drawable/launcher_icon"
            android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>

        <provider
            android:name="androidx.core.content.FileProvider"
            android:authorities="${applicationId}.fileprovider"
            android:exported="false"
            android:grantUriPermissions="true">
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.support.FILE_PROVIDER_PATHS"
                android:resource="@xml/file_paths" />
        </provider>
    </application>
</manifest>

content.content:
package com.court.assistant.data.db

import androidx.room.*

@Entity(
    tableName = "pdf_documents",
    foreignKeys = [ForeignKey(
        entity = CourtSmsEntity::class,
        parentColumns = ["id"],
        childColumns = ["smsId"],
        onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
    )],
    indices = [
        Index(value = ["smsId"]),
        Index(value = ["fileMd5"], unique = true)
    ]
)
data class PdfDocumentEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val smsId: Long,
    val fileName: String,           // 原始文件名
    val filePath: String,
    val fileSize: Long,
    val fileMd5: String,            // MD5哈希用于去重
    val ocrTitle: String? = null,   // OCR提取的标题（首页前15个字）
    val downloadedAt: Long,
    val isSubpoena: Boolean = false,
    val hearingInfo: String? = null,
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
)

package com.court.assistant.data.db

import androidx.room.*

@Entity(
    tableName = "court_sms",
    indices = [Index(value = ["bodyHash"], unique = true)]
)
data class CourtSmsEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val sender: String,
    val body: String,
    val bodyHash: Int,
    val receivedAt: Long,
    val caseNumber: String?,
    val courtName: String?,
    val hearingTime: Long?,
    val partyNames: String?,
    val webUrl: String?,
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
)

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

// 宋氏美学配色 - 素雅中式风格
val Ivory = Color(0xFFFFF8F0)          // 米白底色
val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFFFDF5)      // 暖白
val InkBlack = Color(0xFF2C2C2C)       // 墨色文字
val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF4A4A4A)   // 深灰
val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFFC04851)    // 朱红点缀
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFE8939A)  // 浅朱红
val MistGray = Color(0xFFE8E4DF)       // 雾灰分割线
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFF5F0E8)    // 羊皮纸背景
val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF5B8C5A)      // 玉绿（成功色）
val AmberGold = Color(0xFFD4A843)      // 琥珀金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.3f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}
package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.Typography
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontFamily
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

val CourtTypography = Typography(
    headlineLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 2.sp
    ),
    headlineMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        letterSpacing = 1.sp
    ),
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 18.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 15.sp
    ),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 15.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp
    ),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp
    ),
    labelLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 11.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
)

content.text:
Here is the complete project summary.

---

## Project: CourtAssistant (法院助手)

**Location:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant`

**Project Type:** Native Android app written in Kotlin, using Jetpack Compose for UI.

**Build System:** Gradle (Kotlin DSL), Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.2, Kotlin 1.9.22

**Min SDK:** 26 (Android 8.0) | **Target SDK:** 34 (Android 14)

---

### What This App Does

This is a **Chinese court hearing assistant app** designed for lawyers/legal professionals. It automates the workflow of tracking court notifications received via SMS. The core pipeline is:

1. **SMS Reading & Parsing** -- Reads all SMS messages from the phone, filters for court-related ones (keywords like "法院", "开庭", "传票", "案号"), and extracts structured data: case number, court name, hearing date/time, party names, and embedded URLs.

2. **WebView for Document Service** -- Opens court document delivery URLs (送达链接) in an embedded WebView. When the user navigates to a PDF download link, the app intercepts it and downloads the PDF automatically.

3. **PDF Download & Parsing** -- Downloads court documents (especially subpoenas/传票) and parses them using two strategies:
   - **iText 7** for text-based PDFs
   - **Google ML Kit Chinese OCR** as a fallback for scanned/image PDFs
   Extracts 7 key fields: case number, court name, hearing time, defendant (被传唤人), judge/handler (承办人), location (应到处所), and phone number.

4. **Calendar Sync** -- Automatically creates calendar events for court hearings with reminders at 1 day and 1 hour before. Deduplicates by case number + hearing time.

5. **Local Database** -- Persists all SMS records and downloaded PDFs in a Room database with MD5-based deduplication for documents.

---

### Directory Structure

```
CourtAssistant/
├── build.gradle.kts                  # Root build config (AGP 8.2.2, Kotlin 1.9.22, KSP)
├── settings.gradle.kts               # Project settings
├── gradle.properties                 # JVM args (8GB heap), AndroidX enabled
├── gradlew.bat                       # Gradle wrapper (Windows)
├── local.properties                  # Local SDK path
├── add-to-calendar.patch             # Empty patch file
├── java_pid*.hprof                   # 3 heap dump files (~1.7GB total, likely debug artifacts)
└── app/
    ├── build.gradle.kts              # App module: Compose, Room, iText, ML Kit, OkHttp
    ├── proguard-rules.pro
    └── src/main/
        ├── AndroidManifest.xml       # Permissions: SMS, Calendar, Internet
        ├── res/                      # Drawables, strings, themes, file_paths.xml
        └── java/com/court/assistant/
            ├── CourtApp.kt           # Application class (lazy DB + Repository init)
            ├── MainActivity.kt       # Entry point, permission handling, Compose setup
            ├── calendar/
            │   └── CalendarSync.kt   # Calendar event creation with dedup + reminders
            ├── data/
            │   ├── db/
            │   │   ├── CourtDao.kt          # Room DAO (SMS + PDF CRUD)
            │   │   ├── CourtDatabase.kt     # Room DB v2 with migration
            │   │   ├── CourtSmsEntity.kt    # SMS table entity
            │   │   └── PdfDocumentEntity.kt # PDF table entity (MD5 unique index)
            │   └── repository/
            │       └── CourtRepository.kt   # Repository layer
            ├── pdf/
            │   ├── PdfDownloadManager.kt    # OkHttp downloader with cookie support + MD5
            │   └── PdfParser.kt             # iText + ML Kit OCR, extracts SubpoenaInfo
            ├── sms/
            │   ├── SmsParser.kt             # Regex-based SMS field extraction
            │   └── SmsReader.kt             # ContentResolver SMS reader with keyword filter
            ├── ui/
            │   ├── MainScreen.kt            # SMS list with expandable cards
            │   ├── Navigation.kt            # NavHost: main -> webview -> pdf preview
            │   ├── PdfPreviewScreen.kt      # PDF renderer with hearing info card
            │   ├── WebViewScreen.kt         # Embedded browser with auto PDF interception
            │   └── theme/
            │       ├── Theme.kt             # "Song Dynasty aesthetic" color scheme
            │       └── Type.kt              # Serif typography
            ├── utils/
            │   └── Md5Util.kt               # File MD5 calculation
            ├── viewmodel/
            │   └── MainViewModel.kt         # Central ViewModel: SMS load, PDF download, calendar sync
            └── webview/
                └── CourtWebViewClient.kt    # Intercepts PDF URLs in WebView
```

---

### Key Dependencies

| Library | Purpose |
|---|---|
| Jetpack Compose + Material 3 | UI framework |
| Room 2.6.1 | Local SQLite database |
| iText 7.2.5 | PDF text extraction |
| ML Kit Chinese OCR | Fallback OCR for scanned PDFs |
| OkHttp 4.12 | PDF downloading |
| Navigation Compose | Screen navigation |

### Design Notes

- The UI uses a custom "Song Dynasty aesthetic" (宋氏美学) theme with colors like Ivory, Cinnabar Red, Jade Green, and Amber Gold, with serif typography throughout.
- The footer credits "宋氏美学，单夫纯律师制作保留权利" (Song aesthetic, rights reserved by lawyer Dan Fuchun).
- The 3 `.hprof` heap dump files in the root are ~1.7GB combined and are debug artifacts that should likely be cleaned up.
